message:
🐛 Fix remaining cards going blank on refresh (events, pods, nodes) (#2786)

fetchFromAllClusters and fetchViaGitOpsSSE returned [] when no
clusters were available or backend wasn't authenticated. This
caused the cache to overwrite real data with empty arrays on
browser refresh (before agent reconnects).

Now throws instead of returning [], so the cache layer:
- Preserves existing cached data
- Tracks the failure with backoff retry
- Retries automatically when agent connects

This is the shared foundation that feeds events, pods, nodes,
services, and all other multi-cluster fetchers.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
